zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Bulmer於大約1103年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親Anschetil de Bulmer35歲，母親Sybilia Humez25歲。他和Cecily de Muschamp至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1180年之後。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Bulmer was born about 1103, in Durham, England, his father, Anschetil de Bulmer, was 35 and his mother, Sybilia Humez, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Cecily de Muschamp. He died after 1180.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Bulmerが約1103年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Anschetil de Bulmerは35歳，母Sybilia Humezは25歳であった。彼はCecily de Muschampとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1180年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Bulmer(이)가 대략 1103년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anschetil de Bulmer(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybilia Humez(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Cecily de Muschamp(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Bulmer родился около 1103 г. в местности дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Anschetil de Bulmer было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybilia Humez, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Cecily de Muschamp. Он умер после 1180 г.
